title: Intense Basque Beans Wrap
description: Floral and molten Basque-style bean wrap baked in delicate pandan leaf wrappers, bursting with spicy chilli paste and Mediterranean herbs.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a bowl mix the cooked beans, chilli bean paste, minced garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, smoked paprika, salt and pepper until well combined.
Heat each pandan leaf briefly in a dry skillet to make it pliable, then lay them flat on the parchment.
Spoon a generous amount of bean mixture onto each leaf, add diced roasted red pepper, and top with chopped parsley.
Fold the sides of the leaf over the filling and roll tightly to form a wrap.
Place the wrapped bundles seam side down on the prepared baking sheet, leaving space between each.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges of the wraps are golden and slightly crisp.
Remove from oven, let cool for 5 minutes, then serve warm as a fragrant, Mediterranean-inspired lunch.
